name: Harvest Hall
description: The heart of the ancient complex opens before you in a vast vaulted chamber where irrigation canals converge
beneath a towering bronze construct standing perfectly still among the harvest beds. Great articulated limbs rest
folded at its sides while pale lights flicker slowly behind an expressionless face of polished metal. Around it,
the machinery of the harvest waits in silent expectation. As you step forward, the construct's eyes brighten.
For the first time in centuries, the Harvest Warden moves.TODO: AI Text
